title: Evaporated Waterfalls
description: reduces the likelyhood of waterfalls & lava streams ruining good terrain!
body:
## ☁️💧Evaporated Waterfalls💧☁️

This datapack/mod changes the generation of water springs to spawn **way less often at higher y-levels**, and more often at lower y-levels. This also caps waterfalls to only generate below 
**y-level 160.** And to match, lava streams (aka lavafalls), have also been reduced in general. 

This reduces the likelyhood of waterfalls & lava streams flooding areas and ruin good-looking terrain. As well as reducing the amount of lava streams that lead to forest fires.

## Comparisons
![Waterfalls are now reduced in higher areas such as mountains.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4aabc5027beeefbb2f266ca43c825bf0bafd3c89.jpeg)

![Waterfalls now spawn at lower y-values such as rivers.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d62d922dd12a5ec5ef1745ca357e6c9f922e7726.jpeg)

![Now reduced the amount of lava streams.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4238dc8772a809e205a29060d4e37177caef3523.jpeg)

## Compatibility
- **KNOWN INCOMPATIBILITES:** Tectonic
- Other terrain modifying datapacks or mods may not be compatible with this, for right now there are no plans to increase compatibility.
